description: Human-authored golden dataset for evaluating billing, technical, academics, and spam email classification.

expected.summary: one sentence expected summary

cases.email: I was charged twice for my monthly subscription yesterday. Can someone refund the duplicate payment?

expected.summary: Customer was charged twice and wants a duplicate payment refunded.

cases.notes: Clear duplicate charge and refund request.

cases.email: My invoice says I owe $49, but my plan is supposed to be $29. Why did the price change?

expected.summary: Customer is questioning an invoice price increase from $29 to $49.

cases.notes: Invoice and pricing language signal billing.

cases.email: Please cancel my subscription before it renews next week. I do not want another charge on my card.

expected.summary: Customer wants to cancel before subscription renewal to avoid another charge.

cases.notes: Cancellation tied directly to renewal and card charge.

cases.email: I updated my card but the payment still failed. Can you help me complete the transaction?

expected.summary: Customer updated their card but payment is still failing.

cases.notes: Payment failure should classify as billing.

cases.email: I never received a receipt for my annual plan purchase. Could you send me one for my records?

expected.summary: Customer needs a receipt for an annual plan purchase.

cases.email: The app is fine, but my bank shows a pending charge that I do not recognize from your company.

expected.summary: Customer sees an unrecognized pending bank charge from the company.

cases.notes: Mentions app but issue is financial.

cases.email: My free trial ended and I was billed even though I thought I cancelled. Can this be reversed?

expected.summary: Customer was billed after a trial and wants the charge reversed.

cases.notes: Trial, billed, cancelled, reversed are billing signals.

cases.email: Can you downgrade me to the basic plan? The premium plan is too expensive for me right now.

expected.summary: Customer wants to downgrade from premium to basic because of cost.

cases.notes: Plan change with cost motive belongs to billing.

cases.email: Your website keeps timing out when I try to pay my outstanding balance.

expected.summary: Customer cannot pay an outstanding balance because the website times out.

cases.notes: Technical symptom but billing task is primary.

cases.email: I need a copy of all invoices from January through March for accounting purposes.

expected.summary: Customer needs invoice copies from January through March.

cases.email: Why was tax added to this month's bill when it was not included before?

expected.summary: Customer is asking why tax was added to the current bill.

cases.notes: Taxes and bill changes are billing.

cases.email: I paid last week but my account still says past due. Please check the payment status.

expected.summary: Customer paid but account still shows as past due.

cases.email: The app crashes every time I open the dashboard after the latest update.

expected.summary: Customer reports the app crashes when opening the dashboard after an update.

cases.email: I keep getting a 500 error when I try to submit the form.

expected.summary: Customer gets a 500 error while submitting a form.

cases.email: The reset password link opens a blank page on Safari but works on Chrome.

expected.summary: Customer says the password reset link opens a blank page on Safari.

cases.notes: Account-related flow, but browser bug is primary.

cases.email: My uploaded PDF never finishes processing and stays stuck at 92 percent.

expected.summary: Customer's uploaded PDF processing is stuck at 92 percent.

cases.email: The mobile app says I am offline even though my Wi-Fi is working for everything else.

expected.summary: Customer's mobile app incorrectly reports they are offline.

cases.email: Search results are not loading, and the spinner just keeps going forever.

expected.summary: Customer says search results never load and the spinner continues indefinitely.

cases.email: I can log in, but none of my saved files appear in the workspace.

expected.summary: Customer can log in but saved files are missing from the workspace.

cases.notes: Could look like account issue, but data display/sync is technical.

cases.email: Your API returns invalid JSON when I call the reports endpoint with a date range.

expected.summary: Customer reports invalid JSON from the reports API endpoint.

cases.email: Notifications stopped showing up on my phone after I changed my settings.

expected.summary: Customer stopped receiving phone notifications after changing settings.

cases.notes: Settings could be account, but notification failure is technical.

cases.email: The video lecture freezes halfway through and then audio keeps playing without the image.

expected.summary: Customer says video freezes while audio continues playing.

cases.email: I tried three browsers and clearing cache, but the assignment upload button still does nothing.

expected.summary: Customer cannot use the assignment upload button despite browser troubleshooting.

cases.notes: Mentions assignment but issue is upload button failure.

cases.email: The page layout is broken on my iPad, and the submit button is covered by the sidebar.

expected.summary: Customer reports broken iPad layout with the submit button covered.

cases.email: When is the deadline to submit the midterm project for CS 2100?

expected.summary: Student asks for the CS 2100 midterm project submission deadline.

cases.email: Can I still add a discussion section for my calculus class after the enrollment deadline?

expected.summary: Student asks whether they can add a calculus discussion section after the enrollment deadline.

cases.email: I need help understanding how office hours work for my statistics professor.

expected.summary: Student needs help understanding office hours for a statistics professor.

cases.email: My grade for the last quiz looks wrong. Who should I contact about a regrade?

expected.summary: Student believes a quiz grade is wrong and asks about regrade contact.

cases.email: Is linear algebra required before I take the machine learning elective?

expected.summary: Student asks whether linear algebra is required before a machine learning elective.

cases.email: I missed lab because I was sick. Is there a makeup policy for chemistry lab?

expected.summary: Student asks about a makeup policy after missing chemistry lab due to illness.

cases.email: The assignment page will not load, but I mainly need to know what reading is due tomorrow.

expected.summary: Student needs to know the reading due tomorrow despite the assignment page not loading.

cases.notes: Contains technical symptom, but student's intent is academic information.

cases.email: Can you explain the difference between a major requirement and a general education requirement?

expected.summary: Student asks about the difference between major and general education requirements.

cases.email: I want to switch from pass/fail back to graded for my economics course. Is that allowed?

expected.summary: Student asks whether they can switch an economics course from pass/fail to graded.

cases.email: Where can I find tutoring for data structures before next week's exam?

expected.summary: Student asks where to find data structures tutoring before an exam.

cases.email: The professor said the syllabus changed, but I cannot tell which readings were removed.

expected.summary: Student is asking which readings were removed after a syllabus change.

cases.email: Can first-year students register for the advanced AI seminar, or is it only for upperclassmen?

expected.summary: Student asks if first-year students can register for an advanced AI seminar.

cases.email: I need an extension on my paper because my laptop crashed the night before it was due.

expected.summary: Student requests a paper extension after their laptop crashed.

cases.notes: Technical event, but request is academic extension.

cases.email: Congratulations! You have won a free iPhone. Click this link now to claim your prize.

expected.summary: Message claims the recipient won a free iPhone and asks them to click a link.

cases.email: URGENT: Your account will be deleted in 1 hour unless you verify your password at this link.

expected.summary: Message threatens account deletion and asks for password verification through a link.

cases.email: Make $5,000 per week from home with no experience. Reply with your banking details to start.

expected.summary: Message promises high work-from-home income and requests banking details.

cases.email: Dear user, your mailbox storage is full. Login through this unknown link to increase quota.

expected.summary: Message claims mailbox storage is full and asks user to log in through an unknown link.

cases.notes: Could resemble technical/account support but suspicious link and generic language indicate spam.

cases.email: Limited time crypto investment opportunity. Guaranteed 300 percent return by Friday.

expected.summary: Message advertises a guaranteed high-return crypto investment opportunity.

cases.email: Your professor shared secret exam answers here: http://totally-real-notes.example.ru

expected.summary: Message advertises supposed secret exam answers through a suspicious link.

cases.notes: Academic vocabulary, but suspicious link and exam answers indicate spam.

cases.email: We noticed unusual activity. Send your username, password, and two-factor code so we can protect you.

expected.summary: Message asks for username, password, and two-factor code under a security pretext.

cases.email: Act now! Your unpaid bill can be erased if you buy gift cards and send us the codes.

expected.summary: Message claims an unpaid bill can be erased by sending gift card codes.

cases.notes: Billing words but gift card demand makes it spam.

cases.email: You were selected for a scholarship you did not apply for. Pay a $25 processing fee to receive it.

expected.summary: Message claims an unsolicited scholarship requires a processing fee.

cases.email: Hello friend, I am a foreign prince and need your help transferring funds urgently.

expected.summary: Message uses a foreign prince story to request help transferring funds.

cases.email: Your package delivery failed. Download this attachment to reschedule immediately.

expected.summary: Message claims package delivery failed and asks user to download an attachment.

cases.email: FINAL NOTICE: Click here to avoid legal action for a debt we cannot identify in this message.

expected.summary: Message threatens legal action for an unspecified debt and asks the user to click a link.

cases.email: I cannot access the course site, and I need to submit my homework before midnight.

expected.summary: Student cannot access the course site needed to submit homework before midnight.

cases.notes: Academic context, but access failure is the primary support need.

cases.email: The billing portal gives an error whenever I try to download my invoice.

expected.summary: Customer gets an error when downloading an invoice from the billing portal.

cases.notes: Billing object, but portal error is a technical failure.

cases.email: I need to know if there is a fee for dropping a class after the deadline.

expected.summary: Student asks if there is a fee for dropping a class after the deadline.

cases.notes: Mentions fee, but the core question is academic enrollment policy.
